observations.archetype_gloss: The protagonist undertaking a challenging ascent symbolizing personal growth and struggle
observations.summary: Dan is depicted climbing a difficult rope, enduring physical pain and doubt, symbolizing his heroic journey through trials toward self-overcoming.

evidence.quote: He stood at the base of a rope—thick, rough-woven hemp, blood-warm and slick with something between sweat and oil, vibrating with the hum of the emptiness it pierced. Each grip burned with tiny splinters. He climbed. The air grew thin, then cold, then ringing-silent. A moment of doubt arrived and lodged in him like a stone: some barriers are meant to stand. Some fathers are meant to stay broken. He climbed through it. His arms ached and his breath came in sharp urgent gasps and he climbed through that too, until his hand found an edge—solid, unmoving—and he pulled himself up and over.
